Quakertown NB to Lehigh Valley All Traffic Primary Rt - I-476 North to close, from Sunday, April 12 at 12:00 am through 5:00 am. Take PA 663 North to PA 309 North, I-78 West to PA 309 North, follow to US 22 West or Tilghman Street West. This will bring you to the Lehigh Valley Interchange (56)
